SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: Homeless Outreach - AZ HUGS helps people enter detox rehab and shelter facilities to help them transition out of homelessness. It provides donated clothing medical supplies temporary shelters and transportation to medical legal housing and employment appointments. It also helps people reunite with their families often buying them bus or plane tickets home. AZ HUGS provides numerous meals to hundreds of people each week. The work we do focuses first on making a human connection with our homeless neighbors. AZ HUGS works to create an environment of trust community and personalized care to end homelessness.
